memberdef.argsstring: (BoardCell[,] grid, Room room, int x0, int y0, int x1, int y1)
memberdef.name: AssignRoomRegion

memberdef.argsstring: (Player suggester, Suspect suspect, Weapon weapon, Room room)
memberdef.name: ProcessSuggestion

memberdef.argsstring: (Player suggester, Suspect suspect, Weapon weapon, Room room)
memberdef.name: ResolveSuggestion

memberdef.argsstring: (Player accuser, Suspect suspect, Weapon weapon, Room room)
memberdef.name: ProcessAccusation

memberdef.argsstring: (BoardCell start, List< BoardCell > targets, int maxSteps)
memberdef.name: FindCellInBFS

briefdescription.para: BFS to find the best reachable cell toward a set of targets within N steps.
Call this from a UI button for the human player.
Move the current player to a neighbouring cell. Call from UI (e.g. clicking a highlighted cell).
Human player makes a final accusation.
Main controller for a Cluedo (Clue) board game in Unity. Manages game state, player turns, movement, accusations, and suggestions.
